message:
test: add #[serial] + responsiveness-disable guard to racy tests

Quick companions to the #[serial] additions in src/indexer/mod.rs:

- src/indexer/responsiveness.rs: import serial_test::serial and mark
  conformal_vs_static_idle_dev_trace_is_not_materially_worse and
  conformal_vs_static_under_sustained_pressure_shrinks_similarly so
  they don't interleave with other governor tests that mutate the
  same global conformal-calibration state.

- src/lib.rs: state_meta_json_reports_lexical_rebuild_pipeline_settings
  now sets CASS_RESPONSIVENESS_DISABLE=1 before reading the env-driven
  pipeline settings, same as its siblings in indexer/mod.rs. Without
  the guard the responsiveness governor could shrink the worker count
  underneath the test's expected "9 workers, 4 reserved cores" probe.

Isolated test-only changes, no production behavior affected.
